NAVAREA XIX 81/13
1.RIGLIST. CORRECT AT 131830 UTC SEPT 13. 
   NORWEGIAN SEA: NORTH OF 65N, EAST OF 5W.
    73-29.2N 024-16.5E LEIV ERIKSSON
    72-19.3N 019-35.3E WEST HERCULES
    71-54.2N 020-16.2E TRANSOCEAN ARCTIC       
    70-50.5N 016-33.3E SCARABEO 8              
    66-58.9N 008-23.1E TRANSOCEAN WINNER
    66-14.5N 008-19.6E TRANSOCEAN SPITSBERGEN 
    66-05.3N 008-16.7E SONGA TRYM 
    65-07.1N 006-40.5E DEEPSEA BERGEN
NOTES:
    A. RIGS ARE PROTECTED BY A 500 METRE SAFETY ZONE.
    B. FOR RIGS LOCATED SOUTH OF 65N, REFER TO NAVAREA I 
       WARNINGS OR VISIT WWW.UKHO.GOV.UK/RNW
2. CANCEL NAVAREA XIX 77/13
